Paragraphs.Text: Congratulations on leveling up! You can now train your guards to be more powerful! If you navigate from the hub on the home screen you will see the spirit tab. From there you can train your spirits to be what ever you like! Lets see how you train your spirits to their max potential!

A scientist in the lab gave you this item? Great! You can use it to teach your guards new moves! Some guards require different items depending on their typing so be sure to get the right one from the shop.
Make sure you guard has enough INT to use the higher skilled moves. The higher their INT the higher chance they use the best move for the situation.
Look a wild stray! Make sure to train your spirit before you fighting it.
Amazing! Collect more fragments and summon and control spirits you come across.

darkForest.Name: Catching a spirit with magical skills
